entries.name: raw
entries.description: As collected or generated; no quality control applied.

entries.name: preliminary
entries.description: Automatically screened or near-real-time; subject to revision (e.g., ERA5T, USGS provisional, telemetered data with automated checks).

entries.name: quality_controlled
entries.description: Vetted and considered settled (e.g., consolidated ERA5, USGS approved, a council's validated archive).
